subject: [COMMON] Apply changes for mariadb-init project
commit_message:
[COMMON] Apply changes for mariadb-init project

Two changes are intended with this commit:
- (for proper name mapping) Update VolumeMounts names to be:
(mariadb-init for mountPath /db-init/)
(mariadb-conf for mountPath /db-conf/)
originally it was reversed.
- Make use of (common.mariadbService) and (common.mariadbPort) defined
in (common/templates/_mariadb.tpl) into job.yaml. This will reflect the
proper values for mariadb service name and port in case of local
installation.

Issue-ID: OOM-2737
Signed-off-by: Mahmoud Abdelhamid <mahmoud.abdelhamid@orange.com>
Change-Id: I303f8d5f56632289d8dfd2f2ba8c35819a4f871c

Patch Set 1:

Two reasons led to this change:
- During a review with sylvain we found "common.mariadbService" was defined wrongly in (_mariadb.tpl) which was correct in this change (https://gerrit.onap.org/r/c/oom/+/121074).

- There was a problem during installing a component with local mariadb instance, that we need to have some kind of logic to decide which db to use (the shared one or local installation) [in the case of CDS we used ternary function].

What I am trying to do in this change is to make use of the both defined templates (common.mariadbService) and (common.mariadbPort) to reflect the actual mariadb service name and port in the cases of localCluster is enabled
